name: Beachside Greens
about: Beachside Greens is an indoor golf simulator venue that provides a high-tech, comfortable environment for playing golf year-round. The venue features Foresight Sports Golf Simulators, the same technology used by professional golfers like Tiger Woods and Rickie Fowler. It operates as a bar and lounge, offering food, drinks, and a relaxed atmosphere for both individual practice and social group outings. The facility is open daily with hours that vary from 12pm to 10pm, operating on a reservation-only basis through its website or app. It offers a range of services including open simulator time, private golf lessons, performance training, and space for group events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Foresight Sports Golf Simulators used by top professionals
Ability to play famous courses like Pebble Beach and TPC Sawgrass in any weather
Combines top-tier golf technology with a relaxed, social bar atmosphere
Opportunity for both practice sessions and full rounds of golf on a flexible schedule

food_and_drink.notes: Food and drink specials are mentioned; a full menu is available at the bar.
The venue is a Beer & Wine Lounge, offering a full bar menu.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two cutting-edge golf simulators mentioned as the same high-tech setups used by professionals like Tiger Woods and Rickie Fowler.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided text does not specify whether club rentals are available or if customers must bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has its own Beer & Wine Lounge with a full bar menu and offers food and drink specials. There is no mention of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website states that you can 'practice your swing, play full rounds, or simply enjoy the game in comfort, all in less time,' but it does not provide a specific time for an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue lists 'Birthday Parties' as a type of event they host, suggesting they can accommodate children for such occasions. However, there is no specific mention of general kid-friendly amenities or a family atmosphere.
